title: Ladoo Baba Temple
tagline: Ladoo Baba Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Laddu Baba Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva worshipped as Laddukeshwar but affectionately called Laddu Baba in the town of Sharanakula in Nayagarh district of Odisha, In
overview.description: Laddu Baba Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva worshipped as Laddukeshwar but affectionately called Laddu Baba in the town of Sharanakula in Nayagarh district of Odisha, India. The temple dating back to medieval times shows a fusion of Kalinga and Dravidian temple architecture. Unlike most other Hindu temples, the prayers have traditionally been conducted by priests belonging to low caste. The temple is an important pilgrimage for Shaivites in southern Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ladoo Baba Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ladoo Baba Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ladoo Baba Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ladoo Baba Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ladoo Baba Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ladoo Baba Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ladoo Baba Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
